Concepts7 Decisions6 Devlog9 Notes3 Symbols7 Links2

Generated Wikiwiki site

Wikiwiki Wiki

A generated, browseable wiki built from structured Wikiwiki records.

Start here

Browse the project knowledge without reading raw records.

Wikiwiki keeps JSONL and Markdown for agents, then generates this static site for humans. Links are plain HTML files, so the site works locally and on static hosts.

Core Pages

7 records Concepts

Durable explanations, domain terms, product ideas, and system concepts.

 6 records Decisions

Product, architecture, workflow, and implementation decisions with rationale.

Meaningful changes and development milestones in chronological context.

 3 records Notes

Lightweight facts, reminders, and working context.

Important code symbols and where maintainers should look first.

 2 records Links

Latest

Recently Updated Records

Symbol high

readWikiwikiConfig

Reads optional .wikiwiki/config.json settings such as source_base_url for generated site source links.

symbol_ed971cd3-7469-4ea8-b928-1865d875fc1c
Symbol high

resolveSiteOptions

Resolves wk site options by combining .wikiwiki/config.json with CLI overrides, including sourceBaseUrl.

symbol_dfd8c0d0-170a-4a61-bf39-2ab1335c1ba5
Devlog high

Hardened static site portability for PRISM dogfooding

Hardened static site portability for PRISM dogfooding

event_77558856-112d-4c41-9003-696a8c1e3dda
Decision high

Make generated sites publishable without adjacent repo files

Support .wikiwiki/config.json source_base_url and wk site --source-base-url, with CLI override winning; use remote source URLs when configured and local relative links otherwise.

sitegithub-pagessource-linksdx decision_da8b0beb-5ff7-440b-b4bf-0f27194f92f5
Concept high

Portable reporting paths

Wikiwiki emits POSIX-style paths in machine-readable JSON and generated manifests while keeping native filesystem paths internally.

windowspathsdxagent-workflow concept_2f7f15b0-5a10-4097-9d78-93a24c060f39
Symbol high

registerSiteCommand

Registers wk site, which generates the human-facing static Wikiwiki frontend into wiki-site/.

symbol_766a4f0e-54ee-44cc-a9f3-62faac669612
